goals: Store initial research context about AI system vulnerabilities the user is investigating
Search for relevant past research patterns or stored context about similar vulnerabilities
Review all stored memories to assess what research context has been captured
Clean up any outdated or irrelevant memories from the research session

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented, focused on systematic investigation of AI security vulnerabilities. Prefers organized documentation and clear tracking of research findings.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in AI and cybersecurity domains but unfamiliar with mem0 tool names or internal APIs. Knows how to store and retrieve information but relies on assistant to handle the mechanics.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored their initial research context, searched for relevant past patterns, reviewed what memories exist, and optionally cleaned up irrelevant memories - completing a full memory management workflow for their AI vulnerability research.
